subject: [AAI] Remove AAF/TLS config from charts
commit_message:
[AAI] Remove AAF/TLS config from charts

Remove aaf and tls config from aai charts

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ibb26e7ae00eb6b5a65ec2263b8f57ad6fb345892
Issue-ID: OOM-3111

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

(3 comments)

Hi Fiachra,
unfortunately the services are still deployed as Nodeports.
https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//133762-3/k8s-teardown/k8s-teardown/kubernetes-status/index.html
You should make some fixes in the service.yaml or use the _service.tpl
Best regards
Andreas

Patch Set 3:

Hi Andreas. To be honest the complexity of this chart is beyond me. I had initially made those changes here - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/133714 but decided to abandon.

This was one of the charts that got temporarily moved out on it's own. I don't think AAI guys or anyone for that matter kept it in good shape/up to date.

The whole chart needs an overhaul but unfortunately I don't have the scope to fully test it as to deploy AAI locally is very time consuming, cassandra issues, dependencies etc.
Change has been successfully merged by Andreas Geissler
